1B14A456AE0F|19|Marnette’s compassion attempts to steer him toward peace, not disclosure.

11D93598BAC0|21|Marnette asks anyway, signaling dread and curiosity colliding.

D3CFF96FD750|23|Marnette senses this is planned and intentional, escalating tension.

9B5E359A587D|25|The core bomb drops: salves weren’t born that way, they were \*\*made\*\*.

E344001D0684|27|Frost explains engineered genetics and artificial lifespan limits, defining the system’s cruelty.
